invocations.inputDescription: No arguments; extra arguments are rejected.
invocations.outputDescription: Exact protocol version and independently supported operation names.

errors.description: The preload and main process contract versions differ.

invariants: Response protocolVersion is exactly 2 and operations exactly match the registry order.
invocations.validationBoundary: The named IPC runtime contract validates the entire argument tuple before dispatch and validates the operation result before the renderer receives it.

invocations.inputDescription: No arguments; extra arguments are rejected.
invocations.outputDescription: One validated aggregate snapshot of device, updater, discovery, activity, and allowed actions.

errors.description: The application composition root could not produce a valid snapshot.

invariants: Allowed actions are derived from the same device, updater, and activity state carried by the snapshot.
invocations.validationBoundary: The named IPC runtime contract validates the entire argument tuple before dispatch and validates the operation result before the renderer receives it.

invocations.inputDescription: No arguments; extra arguments are rejected.
invocations.outputDescription: Completed scan outcome and a fresh aggregate application snapshot.

errors.description: Another application operation is active or admission is draining.

invariants: Every discovered candidate is revalidated and returned only inside the resulting aggregate snapshot.
invocations.validationBoundary: The named IPC runtime contract validates the entire argument tuple before dispatch and validates the operation result before the renderer receives it.

invocations.inputDescription: One current exact candidate selected from scan-devices.
invocations.outputDescription: Completed connection outcome and a fresh aggregate application snapshot.

errors.description: USB, firmware, command, telemetry, or RF-off admission failed.

invariants: The main process validates the candidate before device admission and refreshes updater state after connection.
invocations.validationBoundary: The named IPC runtime contract validates the entire argument tuple before dispatch and validates the operation result before the renderer receives it.

invocations.inputDescription: No arguments; extra arguments are rejected.
invocations.outputDescription: Completed disconnect outcome and a fresh aggregate application snapshot.

errors.description: RF-off or serial close could not be confirmed.

invariants: Failure never reports a safe disconnected state, and successful disconnect refreshes updater state.

invocations.inputDescription: No arguments; extra arguments are rejected.
invocations.outputDescription: Cancelled or completed native-confirmation outcome and a fresh aggregate application snapshot.

errors.description: The fault is not eligible for physical power-off recovery.

invariants: Recovery is attempted only after an independent native confirmation that the analyzer was physically powered off.

errors.description: Target selection is locked by preparation or write state.

invariants: Main-process policy admits target changes only before preparation.
invocations.validationBoundary: The named IPC runtime contract validates the entire argument tuple before dispatch and validates the operation result before the renderer receives it.

invocations.inputDescription: No path or other renderer-controlled argument is accepted.
invocations.outputDescription: Cancelled or completed native file selection and a fresh aggregate snapshot.

errors.description: Native selection or strict local build admission failed.

invariants: Only native main receives the selected path; renderer IPC carries neither a path nor raw manifest bytes.

errors.description: No admitted outdated physical device is connected, or the update state forbids download.
The pinned firmware artifact could not be fetched or verified.

invariants: Only the exact-length, pinned-SHA OEM artifact can enter verified state, and this operation is unavailable for local-custom targets.
invocations.validationBoundary: The named IPC runtime contract validates the entire argument tuple before dispatch and validates the operation result before the renderer receives it.

errors.description: Diagnostics, battery, screen capture, evidence persistence, or safe disconnect failed.

invariants: Preparation evidence is persisted before the admitted CDC session is disconnected.

Durable transaction evidence does not support a safe write attempt.

invariants: The main process supplies the target-kind-specific internal confirmation literal only after independent native confirmation.
